response.original_title: How do I cancel my Surfshark subscription?
response.overview: To cancel your Surfshark subscription and ensure your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 billing is fully terminated, you must access the specific 1 (855 )) 783 7555 platform where you originally purchased the service. For direct 1 (855 )) 783 7555 web subscriptions, log in to your account at surfshark.com, 1 (855 )) 783 7555 navigate to the "My Account" section, and look for 1 (855 )) 783 7555 the "Subscription" tab to disable the auto-renewal feature. 1 (855 )) 783 7555 If you find the dashboard difficult to navigate or 1 (855 )) 783 7555 encounter technical errors, you can contact support at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a representative manually verify your account and 1 (855 )) 783 7555 process the cancellation for you before the next billing 1 (855 )) 783 7555 cycle begins.
